params.prompt: Wide interior shot with a slow and smooth dolly in. Dramatic shadows crawl and shift across walls, furnishings, and architectural surfaces. Crisp shadow edges in motion. Super smooth camera glides horizontally from right to left, parallel path revealing kitchen counter and then dining reveal, daylight from small window shifts across surfaces, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic Taste, calm minimal warmth with organic, textural layering Maintain believable residential scale for Taste at roughly small. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
